TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Montenegro Itini i 42 30 N, 19 18 E, noYoropi ko Montenegro. Polong no sekalay i 13,812 sq km "saka 162 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 13,452 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 360 sq km " Polong i 644,578 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 38.20%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 40.40%, malo no roma to a sera 21.40%. siyoto O Podgorica ko Siyoto. Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakapito 13 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Filip Vujanovińá, patirengan a romi'ad i 2003 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 22 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: mo~unt…ôn…ô*ro~u itini i ** ** n, ** ** …ô, no~ujo~uro~upi ko~u mo~unt…ôn…ô*ro~u. po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u s…ôka…ĺaj i **,*** s* km "saka *** ko~u rajraj no~u ŇčaŇčan. " "o~u s…ôka…ĺaj no~u s…ôra i, **,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a s…ôka…ĺaj i, *** s* km " po~u…ĺo~uŇč i ***,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. s…ôra masaki…ĺa ¶ ko~u s…ôra o~u ma…ĺo~u kakao~umańß…ôn a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ki…ĺaki…ĺaŇčan a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a s…ôra **.**%. sijo~uto~u o~u po~u…¨~…ģ*o~uri ¶a ko~u sijo~uto~u. pińßirat…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i sakapito~u ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit anini i ¶i fi…ĺip b~vo~u~ujano~ub~vi*, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw ¶ia ***
S.FORM: Montenegro Itini i 42 30 N, 19 18 E, noYoropi ko Montenegro. Polong no sekalay i 13,812 sq km "saka 162 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 13,452 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 360 sq km " Polong i 644,578 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 38.20%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 40.40%, malo no roma to a sera 21.40%. siyoto O Podgorica ko Siyoto. Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakapito 13 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Filip Vujanovińá, patirengan a romi'ad i 2003 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 22 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: mo~unt…ôn…ô*ro~u itini i ** ** n, ** ** …ô, no~ujo~uro~upi ko~u mo~unt…ôn…ô*ro~u. po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u s…ôka…ĺaj i **,*** s* km "saka *** ko~u rajraj no~u ŇčaŇčan. " "o~u s…ôka…ĺaj no~u s…ôra i, **,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a s…ôka…ĺaj i, *** s* km " po~u…ĺo~uŇč i ***,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. s…ôra masaki…ĺa ¶ ko~u s…ôra o~u ma…ĺo~u kakao~umańß…ôn a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ki…ĺaki…ĺaŇčan a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a s…ôra **.**%. sijo~uto~u o~u po~u…¨~…ģ*o~uri ¶a ko~u sijo~uto~u. pińßirat…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i sakapito~u ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit anini i ¶i fi…ĺip b~vo~u~ujano~ub~vi*, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw ¶ia ***
